samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO implementation with configurable parameters for depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH">Data width parameter.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH">FIFO depth parameter.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define internal signals
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_data;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_next;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_next;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_buffer;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer_next;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_buffer_next;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_buffer_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer_next_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_buffer_next_reg;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer_reg_next;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_buffer_reg_next;

        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_buffer_reg_next_next_next_next;
